target_audience: Women aged 35–70 who enjoy sewing and crafting but feel intimidated by their serger/overlocker.
design_vibe: Premium yet approachable, warm, trustworthy, creative, feminine, and easy to read. Not trendy or overly modern. Soft blush pink accents on clean white.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-normal tracking-tight leading-tight text-foreground
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-normal tracking-tight leading-tight text-foreground

guidelines: Use Playfair Display primarily for H1, H2, and pull quotes. Italic accents inside headings are encouraged for a premium feel (e.g., Love Your Serger).
Body text must use Manrope and be large enough (min 17-18px / text-lg) for the 35-70yo audience.
Do not use overly bold weights for headings; rely on size and the serif font's elegance (font-normal or font-medium).

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. 2-3x more whitespace than standard layouts to create a calm, untroubled learning environment.

buttons.primary: bg-[#C24153] hover:bg-[#A73545] text-white font-medium text-lg md:text-xl py-4 px-8 rounded-full transition-all duration-300 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-0.5 text-center flex justify-center items-center
buttons.guideline: Buttons must be pill-shaped (rounded-full). Always use the exact text 'BUY NOW' with NO other variations. High contrast against both white and blush backgrounds.

animations.scroll_reveal: Gentle fade-up. initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.6, ease: 'easeOut' }}
animations.hover: Subtle lift and shadow increase. No harsh flashes or rapid scaling.

header.layout: Simple clean top bar. Logo left, BUY NOW right. Sticky on desktop with glassmorphism (bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md).
header.mobile: Logo centered, no hamburger menu needed as it's a single page sales letter.

hero.layout: Split 2-column on desktop. Left: Headline, subheadline, trust badge, BUY NOW button. Right: Hero image (sewing-overlocker.jpeg) with soft rounded corners and subtle shadow.

frustration_empathy.layout: Centered text maximum width 3xl. Focus on the emotional pain of threading, tension issues, and fear of the machine.

imagine_transformation.layout: Grid or side-by-side contrasting the frustration. 'Imagine confidently finishing seams...'
imagine_transformation.typography: Playfair Display italics for emotional keywords.

course_intro.layout: Premium card style (bg-white border border-[#E8DADA] rounded-3xl p-8 md:p-12 shadow-lg). Image of Thread Tension Masterclass. Highlight the value.

modules.layout: Bento grid or vertical stacked cards. Each module needs generous padding. Use the provided carousel images for module visuals.
modules.style: bg-[#F9E8E8]/30 border border-[#E8DADA]/50 rounded-2xl p-6 md:p-8

testimonials.style: bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-[#E8DADA]/50. Use Playfair for the quotes to add a premium editorial feel.

student_projects.layout: Image gallery grid (3 or 4 columns) of real student projects. No text needed, just beautiful photos showing what's possible.

meet_nicole.layout: Split section. Photo of Nicole with a soft organic shape or rounded rectangle on one side, heartfelt bio on the other.

objections_faq.layout: Clean accordion using shadcn/ui. Smooth expand/collapse. Question in Manrope medium text-lg, answer in standard text-base.
objections_faq.icon: Use Plus/Minus icons. Simple and accessible.

guarantee.layout: Centered layout with the money-back badge image prominently displayed. Boxed area with a subtle dashed border or premium shadow to look like a certificate.

final_close.layout: Centered, distraction-free. Emotional final plea. Large BUY NOW button.

mobile_sticky_bar.layout: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 p-4 bg-white/95 backdrop-blur-md border-t border-[#E8DADA] shadow-[0_-10px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] z-50 md:hidden flex justify-center items-center

testing_and_accessibility.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements (buttons, accordion triggers, links) MUST include a kebab-case data-testid attribute based on role (e.g., data-testid='hero-buy-now-btn', data-testid='faq-accordion-trigger-1').
testing_and_accessibility.contrast: Ensure primary CTA color #C24153 has sufficient contrast against white and soft blush backgrounds.
testing_and_accessibility.aria_labels: Add descriptive aria-labels to the BUY NOW buttons if context is needed, though the text itself is clear.
